name: Mrs. Field's Creamy Peanut Butter Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the butter cookies until finely ground.
2. Add the melted butter and mix.
3. Press the crumb mixture into an 8x8 baking pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes. Cool to room temperature.
5. Melt the chocolate and pour half into the pan, spreading it evenly over the crust.
6. Place the pan in the refrigerator.
7. Blend the peanut butter and softened butter together using an electric mixer until smooth.
8. Slowly beat in the confectioners' sugar and vanilla extract until smooth.
9. Spread the mixture over the chilled chocolate layer.
10. Pour the remaining warm chocolate over the top and spread it smoothly.
11. Chill in the refrigerator for one hour.
12. Yields 24-36 bars.
